calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Continued To Nov-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lon Lazar for (administrator) Shawnae Lorenz.

The Court stated that there was no response to the examiner's notes, that there is a question as to whether the petitioner was ever confined to a prison or facility and asked what happened to the $75,000.00 in cash. Mr. Lazar responded that his client was never confined to a prison or facility, that the estate is simple and the administrator is the sole heir, that the assets were assembled, taxes and liabilities were paid, that the $75,000.00 is with the administrator, that it had been in a bank account and was transferred into the estate and that it goes to the administrator. The Court stated that the administrator needs authority to pay it to herself, that it was not addressed in the petition for final distribution and that the petition only shows $51,000.00 on hand. Mr. Lazar stated that the difference is the costs of the administration. The Court stated that the petition shows the only property is the $51,000.00, that it does not address the $75,000.00 and that the petition needs to address the $75,000.00 being paid to herself. Mr. Lazar stated that he will file an amended petition and will have the administrator sign a waiver of notice. The Petition to Probate Final Report, etc., was continued to November 15, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2016 Continued To Sep-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Continued To Aug-30-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lon Lazar for and with (Petitioner) Shawnae Lorenz.

The Court stated that we have a petition for probate and letters, that we have a signed will that has procedural defects and asked if it satisfies as being intended as a will. Mr. Lazar reported that when the will was executed the decedent did not have legal representation, did not know that it had to be witnessed, that there are only 2 heirs and both have disclaimed interest and both want Ms. Lorenz to be the administrator. The Court stated that the evidence suggests that this was his intent, granted the petition for Letters of Administration and signed the order in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
